items.title: Rising Error Rate Trend
items.description: System metrics show an increasing trend in error rates, which could indicate developing issues in application stability or resource handling.
items.predicted_impact: If not addressed, rising error rates could lead to service degradation, poor user experience, and potential system instability within 24-48 hours.
items.suggested_action:
1. Analyze error logs to identify error patterns
2. Review recent code changes that might contribute to errors
3. Monitor resource utilization for potential bottlenecks

items.title: Rising Error Rate
items.description: The error rate trend is currently rising, indicating potential issues in the system that may lead to failures or degraded performance.
items.predicted_impact: If not addressed, the rising error rate could lead to system instability and increased downtime.
items.suggested_action: Investigate recent changes and deployments to identify the cause of the rising error rate. Implement monitoring and alerting to catch issues early.

items.title: High P99 Latency
items.description: The P99 latency of 420ms is significantly high, suggesting that a small percentage of requests are experiencing long wait times, which could impact user experience.
items.predicted_impact: Continued high latency could lead to user dissatisfaction and potential loss of users.
items.suggested_action: Analyze the causes of high latency, optimize code and database queries, and consider scaling resources if necessary.

items.title: Unsigned Commits
items.description: Recent commits are unsigned, which could pose a security risk if malicious code is introduced.
items.predicted_impact: Unsigned commits can lead to security vulnerabilities if not properly vetted.
items.suggested_action: Implement a policy requiring signed commits to ensure code integrity and security.
